connections.def: from 2875; blunted, i.e. (figuratively) of hearing (deaf) or speech (dumb):--deaf, dumb, speechless. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: bind, be dumb, put to silence.

connections.def: from 1 (as a negative particle) and 5456; voiceless, i.e. mute (by nature or choice); figuratively, unmeaning:--dumb, without signification. see GREEK for 1 see GREEK for
from 1 (as a negative particle) and 2980; mute:--dumb. see GREEK for 1 see GREEK for
